title: mentha × verticillata f. pilosa
intro: Mentha × verticillata f. pilosa, also known as American wild mint or American horsemint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata f. pilosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce nausea, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
